17 
CLM_BPRVDR_CITY_NAME 
LABEL: 
Billing Provider Address — City 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the billing provider city name, as submitted on the encounter. 
SHORT NAME: CLM_BPRVDR_CITY_NAME 
LONG NAME: CLM_BPRVDR_CITY_NAME 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
30 
SOURCE: 
Medicare Advantage Organizations (MAOs) 
FILE(S):

SNF base 
HH base 
OP base 
Carrier base 
DME base
